description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of GRANMIX Seeds and Nut Granola, featuring a predominantly white and green color scheme. The front displays the GRANMIX logo in large green letters, with a photo of a bowl of granola and nuts, and text highlighting it as a source of fiber. The back of the box provides a recipe in three steps, a list of ingredients, and images of other product varieties. One side panel lists nutritional information in a structured table, while the other side highlights product benefits with simple icons and green text. The box is sealed and appears to be designed for retail sale, with all surfaces printed and no transparent windows. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in urban grocery stores or markets.
description: A rectangular GRANMIX Seeds and Nut Granola box with white and green graphics, featuring product images, nutritional info, and benefits.
description_view_0: Front view shows the GRANMIX logo, product name, a bowl of granola, and fiber source label.
description_view_1: Side view displays detailed nutritional information and product name vertically.
description_view_2: Back view features a recipe, ingredient list, and images of other product varieties.
description_view_3: Opposite side panel highlights product benefits with icons and green text.
attribute_brand_logo: The GRANMIX brand logo is prominently displayed on the front and back, consisting of large green uppercase letters 'GRANMIX' with a circular emblem above it. The logo is centered and uses green as the dominant color.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front and back indicate 'Seeds and Nut Granola' with images of granola, nuts, and seeds, suggesting a nut and seed flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible on one side panel, including a table with values for calories, fats, proteins, and other nutrients.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A green label on the front highlights 'Fuente de Fibra' (Source of Fiber) and the back features a recipe in three steps, but no mascots or special offers are present.
